reason: Successfully tested agent messaging functionality: navigated to app, selected agent, sent math question, and verified correct response containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - App loaded successfully showing home page with two agents listed (QA-20260708-203840-5b89 and QA-20260708-203839-lhv5), both with "idle" status

Clicked the "QA-20260708-203839-lhv5" agent in the sidebar - Successfully navigated to agent detail page at URL /agents/qa-20260708-203839-lhv5-xokob62a4z with page title "QA-20260708-203839-lhv5 · Gamut"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status indicator shows "idle" in top right corner, satisfying the requirement
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Successfully typed message into the input field and clicked send button, which navigated to new chat session URL and changed agent status to "working"
Waited for response - Agent responded in approximately 1 second (displayed as "Worked for 1s"), well within the 3-minute maximum wait time

Verified response mentions "4" - Agent correctly responded with "4" displayed prominently in the chat view. Session was automatically renamed to "Math Question Session" based on content. Agent status returned to "idle" after processing
